trending_videos.title: 『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②／Chainsaw Man –  Assassins Arc Official Trailer 2
trending_videos.description:
◣◣◣◣
『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②
　　　　　　　　　　             　◤◤◤◤

【STAFF】
原作：藤本タツキ（集英社ジャンプコミックス刊）
監督：𠮷原達矢
脚本：瀬古浩司
音楽：牛尾憲輔
キャラクターデザイン：杉山和隆
サブキャラクターデザイン：庄一／瀬尾健／駿／齊田博之／千装直樹
悪魔デザイン：押山清高
衣装デザイン：山本彩／中村七左
美術監督：竹田悠介／宗政拓
色彩設計：中野尚美 
カラースクリプト：Chavoom
3DCGディレクター：山内智史／玉井真広　　
撮影監督：伊藤哲平
編集：吉武将人
音響監督：名倉靖
制作：MAPPA　

【CAST】
デンジ：戸谷菊之介
ポチタ：井澤詩織
マキマ：楠木ともり
早川アキ：坂田将吾
パワー：ファイルーズあい　　
東山コベニ：高橋花林
岸辺：津田健次郎
天使の悪魔：内田真礼
ビーム：花江夏樹
暴力の魔人：内田夕夜
蜘蛛の悪魔：後藤沙緒里

■アニメ『チェンソーマン』公式サイト：https://chainsawman.dog/
■公式X：@CHAINSAWMAN_PR（https://twitter.com/ CHAINSAWMAN_PR）

© 藤本タツキ／集英社・ＭＡＰＰＡ

コミックス1～24巻発売中！
#チェンソーマン
#chainsawman
#刺客篇
#mappa

trending_videos.title: Fall asleep while I build a zoo (Part 2)
trending_videos.description:
Fall asleep while I play PLANET ZOO (PART 2) - Back for more, building a zoo with calm commentary and chill life chats and advice! Episode 49 of my gaming ASMR series to help you sleep, relaxing gameplay & chill commentary with MadMorph, perfect for study, background noise, relaxation, and sleep. 

Check out the podcast below, on Spotify and everywhere you get podcasts. 

►  My PODCAST for sleep: https://downtosleeppodcast.com
Down To Sleep - FREE on Spotify & everywhere you get podcasts

►  My Patreon: https://patreon.com/downtosleep

trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Zenless Zone Zero v3.1: Official Void Hunter Agent Remielle Trailer
trending_videos.description: Get an early look at the Void Hunter Agent Remielle in Zenless Zone Zero Version 3.1! This preview of in-development content showcases Remielle's distinctive visual design, signature moves, and in-game combat style. Remielle will make her official debut as a brand-new S-rank Agent in the Zenless Zone Zero's Anniversary update, Version 3.1.

trending_videos.title: Playing the REAL Verity Mod... Yet Again...
trending_videos.description:
The following video is a work of fiction and a creative horror project. All real-world elements are staged using imitation props. All real-life weapons shown are BB guns and fake. The real life footage part is also CGI. 

Today I played with Verity AGAIN (Part 3)... CREDIT TO @ThatMob For letting me make a parody of his popular verity mod series!
JOIN MY DISCORD: https://discord.gg/8ruCMPWV3u

Voicing done by @SlipperyHeavyCream (voice impersonator final boss)
NOT THATMOB'S VA JustWhispy‬ 

THIS IS NOT A REAL MOD PLEASE DO NOT ASK THATMOB OR ME FOR THE MOD, I CREATED THIS ANIMATION / SHORT STORY.

#lookout3d #minecraft #minecraftmemes #minecrafthorror #minecraftarg
tags: The best Moments in Minecraft History

anime_and_manga.description: Content related to popular anime series such as 'Chainsaw Man' is trending, indicating strong viewer interest in anime and manga adaptations.
anime_and_manga.insight: With the growing global popularity of anime, creators can capitalize by producing content around popular series, offering reviews, breakdowns, or related merchandise.

gaming.description: Videos related to gaming, including trailers like 'Meccha Chameleon' and game-related content such as 'Lifesteal World SMP', are trending.
gaming.insight: Gaming remains a strong category on YouTube. Creators can explore new game releases, walkthroughs, or live streaming to engage audiences.

superhero_movies.description: Superhero content, notably Spider-Man, is resonating with viewers, as seen with trailers and breakdown videos.
superhero_movies.insight: Superhero film content continues to attract significant interest. Channels can benefit from timely reviews, Easter egg breakdowns, and fan theories.

television_series.description: Series teasers, such as for 'Outer Banks: Season 5', indicate viewer engagement with upcoming TV series.
television_series.insight: Teasers and discussions about popular TV series can attract viewers, especially when aligned with release schedules and fan discussions.

creative_and_hobbyist_content.description: Unique content such as 'I made my own LARP channel' reflects a niche but engaged audience for personal projects and hobbies.
creative_and_hobbyist_content.insight: Creators can explore niche hobbies and community-driven content to tap into passionate fanbases.

single_video_focus.description: Top channels such as MAPPA CHANNEL, MadMorph, and Sony Pictures Entertainment are trending with only one video each.
single_video_focus.insight: Single high-impact videos can drive significant traffic and subscription growth. Creators should focus on quality and timing of releases.

diverse_content_approach.description: Trending channels cover a broad range of content from anime to gaming and movies.
diverse_content_approach.insight: Diverse content offerings can attract a wider audience. Channels should consider expanding content diversity while maintaining brand consistency.

anime_and_manga_expansion.description: The rising interest in anime-related content presents opportunities for new channels or existing ones to expand their focus.
actionable_steps: Develop content around trending series like 'Chainsaw Man'.
Collaborate with anime influencers for cross-promotion.

gaming_collaborations.description: Gaming content remains lucrative, with potential for collaborations with game developers or other creators.
actionable_steps: Partner with game developers for exclusive content.
Host live gaming events or competitions to engage viewers.

content_timing_and_seasonality.description: Timing content releases with movie and series premieres can maximize viewer engagement.
actionable_steps: Schedule content to coincide with major releases and events.
Create anticipation with countdowns and sneak peeks.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
